creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
this pr(1) updates x11-fonts/sgifonts

Sumamry:

Makefile
bumps PORTREVISION
fixes (replaces) MASTER_SITES
changes (to me) MAINTAINER

distinfo
adds TIMESTAMP

Why?

I still use this, and on a new install I
discovered that the MASTER_SITES was broken,
and that ports@ was maintainer.

That's it!

Please find the svn diff x11-fonts_sgifonts.diff , attached
For bonus points; I'm adding a QA LOG! :-)

Thanks!

--Chris
